summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
feature: iOS FALCON - Device Settings / Software Tab
scenario: Charge Stand displays incorrect name and placeholder image in Device Settings "Software" tab after being unplugged and app restart
description_clean: Charge Stand is not properly displayed in the "Software" tab under Device Settings when it is unplugged. After unplugging the Charge Stand and restarting the app, the Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. Plugging the Charge Stand back in refreshes the page and shows the correct information. Expected behavior: Charge Stand should be displayed correctly even when unplugged.
steps: Unplug the Charge Stand from the device.
Navigate to Device Settings and open the "Software" tab.
expected: Charge Stand should be displayed correctly with its proper name and image in the "Software" tab under Device Settings, even when unplugged.
actual: The Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name, and its image is replaced with a placeholder image.
